extDescription.message: Track your ANEF naturalization status in real time

popup_maintenance_desc.message: The ANEF site is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.

popup_password_expired_desc.message: Your ANEF password has expired. Log in to the ANEF portal to renew it, then retry.

popup_session_expired_desc.message: Your ANEF session has expired. Log in again to refresh your status.

popup_login_hint.description: Popup login hint text after credentials link

popup_no_data_desc.message: Visit your ANEF portal to retrieve your status.

popup_loading_hint.message: This operation may take up to 45 seconds

popup_step_default.description: Popup default step indicator when step is unknown

popup_history_incomplete_desc.message: Enter your past step dates to enrich statistics

popup_stat_entretien.description: Popup stat label for interview date

popup_stat_last_update.description: Popup stat label for last update

popup_detail_national.description: Popup detail label for national number

popup_detail_type.description: Popup detail label for request type

popup_last_check.description: Popup label for last check time

popup_autocheck_settings.description: Popup link to edit autocheck in settings

popup_never.description: Popup label when no check has been done

popup_password_expired_banner.message: ANEF password expired · renew on the portal
popup_password_expired_banner.description: Popup banner when password is expired

popup_autocheck_creds_required.description: Popup banner when autocheck needs credentials

canvas_entretien_planned.description: Canvas share image: planned interview label

canvas_last_update.description: Canvas share image: last update label

canvas_date_at.description: Date formatting separator between date and time

quote_1_text.message: Patience is the key to well-being.

quote_2_text.message: All things come to those who wait.

quote_3_text.message: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet.

quote_4_text.message: Adopt the pace of nature: her secret is patience.

quote_5_text.message: Patience is the art of hoping.

quote_6_text.message: What is deferred is not lost.

quote_7_text.message: Great works are born of patience.

quote_8_text.message: Patience and time do more than force and rage.

quote_9_text.message: Slow and steady wins the race.

quote_11_text.message: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

quote_12_text.message: Waiting is already half of happiness.

options_pull_dates.description: Options button: pull dates from database

options_step_dates_hint.message: Enter the dates of your step changes to enrich community statistics.

options_no_history_hint.message: Visit the ANEF site to start recording your history.

options_auto_login_desc.message: Save your ANEF credentials to enable automatic refresh even if your session has expired.

options_no_credentials.description: Options label when no credentials saved

options_credential_warning.message: Your credentials are stored locally on your device and are never sent to external servers.

options_notifications_desc.message: Receive a notification when your status changes

options_autocheck_desc.message: Checks your status ~3 times a day in the background

options_autocheck_no_creds.message: Saved credentials are required for automatic checking.
options_autocheck_no_creds.description: Options autocheck warning when no credentials

options_stats_warning.message: Anonymous statistics are shared automatically to feed community data. Data sent: step, dates (day only), prefecture. Your case number is replaced with an irreversible hash.

options_history_limit_desc.message: Maximum number of entries to keep

options_export_data_desc.message: Download a backup of all your data (history, settings).

options_import_desc.message: Restore your data from a backup file.

options_delete_all.description: Options delete all data button label

options_debug_info.message: These logs help diagnose extension issues.

options_last_check_banner.description: Options banner showing last check time

options_date_unknown.description: Options label when date is unknown

options_dates_chronological.message: Dates must be in chronological order

options_date_cannot_delete.message: A previously saved date cannot be deleted
options_date_cannot_delete.description: Options validation error: cannot delete saved date

options_dates_pulled.description: Options success: dates pulled from database

options_no_data_found.description: Options notice: no data found in database

options_fill_all_fields.description: Options validation error: fill all fields

options_password_expired_msg.message: ANEF password expired — renew on the portal

options_failures_next.description: Options autocheck failures with next attempt time

options_next_check_hours.description: Options autocheck next: hours and minutes

options_waiting_schedule.description: Options autocheck: waiting to be scheduled

options_confirm_delete_all.message:
Delete all data (history, settings)?
Your login credentials will be kept.
This action is irreversible.
options_confirm_delete_all.description: Options confirm dialog: delete all data

notification_body.description: Notification body with phase and explanation

status_draft_description.message: Your case is being prepared on the ANEF platform. Complete all sections and attach the required documents before submitting.

status_dossier_depose_description.message: Your case has been successfully submitted. It is in the prefecture's queue for initial admissibility review.

status_verification_formelle_a_traiter_d.message: The prefecture has received your application. It has been placed in the queue for initial administrative sorting: verification of mandatory documents and basic conditions.

status_verification_formelle_en_cours_de.message: An officer is verifying the formal admissibility of your case: presence of required documents, validity of documents, legal conditions. Additional documents may be requested.

status_verification_formelle_mise_en_dem.message: Mandatory documents are missing or non-compliant. You will receive a letter detailing the required documents. Respond within the given deadline to avoid case closure.

status_css_mise_en_demeure_a_affecter_de.message: Following the unanswered formal notice, a case closure is being assigned to an officer. Provide the missing documents as soon as possible.

status_css_mise_en_demeure_a_rediger_des.message: The closure of your case is being drafted following the unanswered formal notice. Contact your prefecture if you have submitted the documents.

status_instruction_a_affecter_descriptio.message: Your case has passed the formal verification! It is declared admissible and is waiting to be assigned to a reviewing officer for in-depth examination. You will receive an acknowledgment of receipt.

status_instruction_recepisse_completude_.message: A reviewing officer is examining your case in detail: personal, professional, tax situation, and assimilation. The completeness receipt will be sent. You may be summoned for an interview.
Additional documents received, to be verified
You have provided additional documents as requested by the reviewing officer. The officer is verifying their compliance before continuing the review of your case.

status_instruction_date_ea_a_fixer_descr.message: Your case is officially complete! Mandatory administrative inquiries have been launched (criminal record, intelligence, databases). The assimilation interview date will be set soon.

status_ea_demande_report_ea_description.message: A request to postpone the assimilation interview has been recorded. The prefecture will propose a new date. Be mindful of deadlines to avoid delaying your case.

status_ea_en_attente_ea_description.message: Your summons for the assimilation interview has been sent or is available. Prepare yourself: questions about France (history, culture, republican values), your background, and your motivations.

status_ea_crea_a_valider_description.message: You have completed the assimilation interview! The officer is drafting the report evaluating your language level, knowledge of France, and assimilation into the French community.

status_prop_decision_pref_a_effectuer_de.message: The reviewing officer is analyzing your entire case (inquiries, interview, documents) to formulate a recommendation: favorable, unfavorable, or deferral.

status_prop_decision_pref_en_attente_ret.message: The officer's recommendation is submitted to their hierarchy for validation. This step confirms the opinion before transmission to the prefect. Duration varies by prefecture.

status_prop_decision_pref_prop_a_editer_.message: The opinion is validated and the official recommendation document is being drafted. It summarizes your situation and the prefecture's recommendation to the ministry.

status_prop_decision_pref_en_attente_ret.message: The recommendation document is finalized and sent to the prefect (or their representative) for signature. Once signed, your case will be sent to the Ministry of the Interior (SDANF).

status_controle_a_affecter_description.message: Your case has arrived at the Sub-Directorate for Access to French Nationality (SDANF) in Rezé (44). It is waiting to be assigned to an officer for ministerial review.

status_controle_a_effectuer_description.message: An SDANF officer is reviewing your case: verification of civil status documents, consistency of information, compliance with legal conditions. This step can take several weeks.

status_controle_en_attente_pec_descripti.message: The Central Civil Status Service (SCEC) in Nantes is verifying the authenticity of your foreign civil status documents. This verification is mandatory to validate your identity.

status_controle_pec_a_faire_description.message: The SCEC is verifying your civil status documents. Once validated, your records will be transcribed into French registers if your naturalization is granted.

status_controle_transmise_pour_decret_de.message: Excellent news! The opinion is FAVORABLE. Your case has been sent to the decree department to be included in an upcoming naturalization decree. The end is near!

status_controle_en_attente_retour_hierar.message: The draft decree including your application is submitted for validation by the ministerial hierarchy. This is a normal administrative step before the decree is finalized.

status_controle_decision_a_editer_descri.message: The favorable decision is confirmed. The official decree document including your name is being drafted. You will soon be listed in a naturalization decree.

status_controle_en_attente_signature_des.message: The naturalization decree is finalized and awaiting the minister's or their representative's signature. Once signed, it will be published in the Official Journal.

status_transmis_a_ac_description.message: Your favorable case has been sent to the central administration in charge of preparing decrees. You are in the final stretch of the process!

status_a_verifier_avant_insertion_decret.message: Final random and optional administrative checks before inserting your name in a decree. Ensuring no new element opposes your naturalization.

status_prete_pour_insertion_decret_descr.message: Your case is validated and ready to be inserted in the next naturalization decree. The favorable decision has been signed by the Minister!

status_decret_en_preparation_description.message: A naturalization decree including your name is being prepared. Multiple cases are grouped in each decree before publication in the Official Journal.

status_decret_a_qualifier_description.message: The decree including your name is in the classification phase: categorization and verification of the decree type (naturalization, reinstatement, etc.) before final validation.

status_decret_en_validation_description.message: The naturalization decree is undergoing final validation by the relevant departments. This is the last administrative step before signature and publication.

status_inseree_dans_decret_description.message: Your name is officially listed in a naturalization decree! It is now awaiting publication in the Official Journal of the French Republic.

status_decret_envoye_prefecture_descript.message: The signed decree has been sent to your prefecture. They will summon you for the citizenship welcome ceremony and the handover of your decree.

status_notification_envoyee_description.message: The official notification of your naturalization has been sent to you. You will be summoned to the citizenship welcome ceremony.

status_decret_naturalisation_publie_expl.message: Decree published in the Official Journal

status_decret_naturalisation_publie_desc.message: CONGRATULATIONS! Your naturalization decree has been published in the Official Journal of the French Republic. You are officially a French citizen!

status_decret_naturalisation_publie_jo_e.message: Decree published in the Official Journal

status_decret_naturalisation_publie_jo_d.message: CONGRATULATIONS! Your naturalization decree has been published in the Official Journal. You are officially French! The prefecture will summon you for the ceremony.

status_decret_publie_description.message: CONGRATULATIONS! Your naturalization decree has been published. You are officially a French citizen! The prefecture will summon you for the welcome ceremony.

status_demande_traitee_description.message: Your naturalization application has been fully processed. Check your mail or contact your prefecture to learn the outcome of your case.

status_decision_negative_en_delais_recou.message: Your application has received an unfavorable decision. You have 2 months to file a gracious appeal with the minister (RAPO) or a contentious appeal before the administrative court.

status_decision_notifiee_description.message: The decision regarding your case has been officially notified. Check the letter to learn the nature of the decision and available appeal options.

status_demande_en_cours_rapo_description.message: Your mandatory prior administrative appeal (RAPO) is being reviewed by the ministry. The RAPO is a gracious appeal against an unfavorable decision. Expected response time: approximately 4 months.

status_controle_demande_notifiee_descrip.message: The decision from the ministerial review has been officially communicated to you. Check your mail to learn the next steps for your case.

status_irrecevabilite_manifeste_descript.message: Your application does not meet the legal admissibility conditions (length of residence, residence permit, etc.). Check the eligibility criteria before filing a new application.

status_irrecevabilite_manifeste_en_delai.message: Your application has been declared inadmissible. You may contest this decision through a gracious appeal (RAPO) or a contentious appeal within 2 months.

status_css_en_delais_recours_description.message: Your case has been closed without action (documents not provided on time, withdrawal, etc.). You may file an appeal or submit a new complete application.

status_css_notifie_description.message: The closure of your case has been officially notified. Review the stated reasons before considering a new application.
